close_reason: Positive observation: spawn_blocking for keyring syscalls
description:
Both get() (lib.rs:100-129) and put() (lib.rs:138-170) use tokio::task::spawn_blocking around the keyring call. This is correct: keyring 3 is synchronous (D-Bus round-trip on Linux, Security.framework on macOS, WinAPI on Windows). Calling these on the async runtime would stall other tasks.

A future contributor may suggest 'just call entry.get_password() directly, it's only a few ms' — that's the bug. Document and defend.

Inline comment at lib.rs:103-104 explains the rationale; keep it.
title: Defend: Synchronous keyring calls wrapped in spawn_blocking
